title: ICML Volunteer and Financial Aid Program
description: ICML Volunteer and Financial Aid Program is a conference attendance-support program offering registration, travel support, or student volunteer benefits under current terms administered by International Conference on Machine Learning.
eligibility: Applicants must meet the current event, role, age, location, deadline, and program-specific requirements.
value: Reduced-cost or supported conference participation, with program-specific registration and travel benefits
